Retired, archived, or otherwise inactive\"\r\nSTATE_CONFLICT = \"E. Conflicting source information requiring review\"\r\n\r\n_MISSING = {\"\", \"n/a\", \"na\", \"none\", \"null\", \"unknown\", \"tbd\", \"-\"}\r\n_CABINET = re.compile(r\"\\beoat\\s+(?:is\\s+)?in\\s+(?:an?\\s+)?cabinet\\b\", re.IGNORECASE)\r\n_NOT_INSTALLED = re.compile(r\"\\beoat\\s+(?:is\\s+)?not\\s+installed\\b\", re.IGNORECASE)\r\n_REMOVED = re.compile(r\"\\beoat\\s+(?:was\\s+)?removed\\s+from\\s+(?:the\\s+)?machine\\b\", re.IGNORECASE)\r\n_SAME_EOAT_TOOL = re.compile(r\"\\bsame\\s+eoat\\s+as\\s+tool\\s*#?\\s*([0-9/]+)\", re.IGNORECASE)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _text(value: Any) -> str:\r\n    if value is None:\r\n        return \"\"\r\n    return str(value).replace(\"\\r\\n\", \"\\n\").replace(\"\\r\", \"\\n\").strip()\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _date(value: Any) -> date | None:\r\n    if isinstance(value, datetime):\r\n        return value.date()\r\n    if isinstance(value, date):\r\n        return value\r\n    raw = _text(value)\r\n    if raw.casefold() in _MISSING:\r\n        return None\r\n    try:\r\n        return date.fromisoformat(raw[:10])\r\n    except ValueError:\r\n        return None\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _is_audited(row: dict[str, Any]) -> bool:\r\n    return _text(row.get(\"Entry Type\")).casefold() == \"audited\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _is_verified(row: dict[str, Any]) -> bool:\r\n    return _text(row.get(\"Physical Audit Verified\")).casefold() == \"yes\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _machine(row: dict[str, Any]) -> str:\r\n    value = _text(row.get(\"Press/Machine #\"))\r\n    return value if value.isdigit() else \"\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _row_number(item: tuple[int, dict[str, Any]]) -> int:\r\n    return int(item[0])\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _latest(items: list[tuple[int, dict[str, Any]]]) -> list[tuple[int, dict[str, Any]]]:\r\n    dated = [(number, row, _date(row.get(\"Audit Date\"))) for number, row in items]\r\n    available = [value for _, _, value in dated if value is not None]\r\n    if not available:\r\n        return items\r\n    latest_date = max(available)\r\n    return [(number, row) for number, row, value in dated if value == latest_date]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _active_relationships(database: dict[str, Any], key: str, eoat: str) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:\r\n    return [\r\n        row for row in database.get(\"relationships\", {}).get(key, [])\r\n        if _text(row.get(\"eoat_identifier\")).casefold() == eoat.casefold() and bool(row.get(\"is_current\"))\r\n    ]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _join(values: Iterable[Any]) -> str:\r\n    return \" | \".join(_text(value) for value in values if _text(value))\r\n\r\n\r\ndef classify_eoat_locations(\r\n    source_rows: dict[int, dict[str, Any]], database: dict[str, Any]\r\n) -> dict[str, Any]:\r\n    \"\"\"Classify one current physical state per EOAT and calculate parity metrics.\"\"\"\r\n    grouped: dict[str, list[tuple[int, dict[str, Any]]]] = defaultdict(list)\r\n    tool_to_eoats: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)\r\n    for number, row in source_rows.items():\r\n        eoat = _text(row.get(\"EOAT Assembly ID\"))\r\n        if not eoat:\r\n            continue\r\n        grouped[eoat].append((int(number), row))\r\n        tool = _text(row.get(\"Tool #\"))\r\n        if tool.casefold() not in _MISSING:\r\n            tool_to_eoats[tool].add(eoat)\r\n\r\n    database_eoats = {\r\n        _text(row.get(\"business_identifier\")).casefold(): row for row in database.get(\"eoats\", [])\r\n    }\r\n    identity_conflicts: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)\r\n    for eoat, items in grouped.items():\r\n        for _, row in items:\r\n            match = _SAME_EOAT_TOOL.search(_text(row.get(\"Notes\")))\r\n            if not match:\r\n                continue\r\n            for other in tool_to_eoats.get(match.group(1), set()):\r\n                if other != eoat:\r\n                    identity_conflicts[eoat].add(other)\r\n                    identity_conflicts[other].add(eoat)\r\n\r\n    records: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\r\n    for eoat in sorted(grouped, key=str.casefold):\r\n        all_items = sorted(grouped[eoat], key=_row_number)\r\n        audited = [item for item in all_items if _is_audited(item[1])]\r\n        current = _latest(audited) if audited else []\r\n        db_eoat = database_eoats.get(eoat.casefold(), {})\r\n        inactive = not bool(db_eoat.get(\"is_active\", True)) or bool(db_eoat.get(\"archived_at\")) or _text(\r\n            db_eoat.get(\"status\")\r\n        ).casefold() in {\"retired\", \"archived\", \"inactive\"}\r\n        stored_rows = [item for item in current if _CABINET.search(_text(item[1].get(\"Notes\")))]\r\n        negative_rows = [\r\n            item for item in current\r\n            if _NOT_INSTALLED.search(_text(item[1].get(\"Notes\"))) or _REMOVED.search(_text(item[1].get(\"Notes\")))\r\n        ]\r\n        installed_rows = [\r\n            item for item in current\r\n            if _is_verified(item[1])\r\n            and _text(item[1].get(\"Audit Context\")).casefold() == \"installed on machine\"\r\n            and _machine(item[1])\r\n            and item not in negative_rows\r\n            and item not in stored_rows\r\n        ]\r\n        installed_machines = sorted({_machine(row) for _, row in installed_rows}, key=lambda value: int(value))\r\n\r\n        machine_number = \"\"\r\n        storage_location = \"\"\r\n        ambiguity = \"\"\r\n        if inactive:\r\n            state = STATE_INACTIVE\r\n            confidence = \"High\"\r\n            evidence = \"Database asset is inactive or archived; no active physical placement should be asserted.\"\r\n            correction = \"Ensure no active installation or storage assignment remains.\"\r\n        elif identity_conflicts.get(eoat):\r\n            state = STATE_CONFLICT\r\n            confidence = \"Review required\"\r\n            related = \", \".join(sorted(identity_conflicts[eoat], key=str.casefold))\r\n            evidence = f\"Audit notes say this is the same physical EOAT represented by {related}.\"\r\n            ambiguity = \"Distinct EOAT identifiers may represent one physical asset.\"\r\n            correction = \"Resolve asset identity before creating any normalized current-location row.\"\r\n        elif stored_rows:\r\n            state = STATE_STORED\r\n            confidence = \"High\"\r\n            storage_location = \"EOAT storage cabinet (cabinet identifier not recorded)\"\r\n            evidence = _join(\r\n                f\"row {number}: {_text(row.get('Notes'))}\" for number, row in stored_rows\r\n            )\r\n            if any(_text(row.get(\"Audit Context\")).casefold() == \"installed on machine\" for _, row in stored_rows):\r\n                ambiguity = \"Generic Audit Context/machine field conflicts with the explicit not-installed cabinet note; note governs.\"\r\n            correction = (\r\n                \"Add a sanctioned generic cabinet/location observation with the audit observation date; \"\r\n                \"do not invent stored_at or a cabinet identifier.\"\r\n            )\r\n        elif len(installed_machines) > 1:\r\n            state = STATE_CONFLICT\r\n            confidence = \"Review required\"\r\n            evidence = f\"Latest physically verified audited rows assert simultaneous installation on machines {', '.join(installed_machines)}.\"\r\n            ambiguity = \"One EOAT identifier cannot be actively installed on multiple machines.\"\r\n            correction = \"Resolve whether the identifier represents multiple assets or which one machine is current.\"\r\n        elif installed_machines:\r\n            state = STATE_INSTALLED\r\n            confidence = \"Medium\"\r\n            machine_number = installed_machines[0]\r\n            evidence = _join(\r\n                f\"row {number}: verified audit on {_text(row.get('Audit Date'))}, machine {_machine(row)}\"\r\n                for number, row in installed_rows\r\n            )\r\n            correction = (\r\n                \"Represent as an observed current installation after adding sanctioned observation-time semantics; \"\r\n                \"do not use the audit date as the original installed_at.\"\r\n            )\r\n        elif negative_rows:\r\n            state = STATE_UNKNOWN\r\n            confidence = \"High that it was not installed; low for its destination\"\r\n            evidence = _join(f\"row {number}: {_text(row.get('Notes'))}\" for number, row in negative_rows)\r\n            ambiguity = \"Source does not identify a current storage location.\"\r\n            correction = \"Keep current location unknown and physically verify; do not create an installation or storage assignment.\"\r\n        else:\r\n            state = STATE_UNKNOWN\r\n            confidence = \"Low\"\r\n            evidence = \"No latest physically verified audited row establishes an installed, stored, or inactive state.\"\r\n            ambiguity = \"Current physical location is not verified.\"\r\n            correction = \"Keep current location unknown and physically verify.\"\r\n\r\n        installations = _active_relationships(database, \"installations\", eoat)\r\n        storage = _active_relationships(database, \"storage_assignments\", eoat)\r\n        observations = [\r\n            row for row in database.get(\"relationships\", {}).get(\"location_observations\", [])\r\n            if _text(row.get(\"eoat_identifier\")).casefold() == eoat.casefold()\r\n            and bool(row.get(\"is_authoritative\", True))\r\n        ]\r\n        db_machine = \", \".join(sorted({_text(row.get(\"machine_number\")) for row in installations}))\r\n        db_storage = \", \".join(sorted({_text(row.get(\"location_code\")) for row in storage}))\r\n        observed_states = {_text(row.get(\"state\")).upper() for row in observations}\r\n        observed_machines = {_text(row.get(\"machine_number\")) for row in observations if _text(row.get(\"machine_number\"))}\r\n        if state == STATE_INSTALLED:\r\n            parity_pass = (\r\n                (len(installations) == 1 and db_machine == machine_number and not storage)\r\n                or (\"INSTALLED\" in observed_states and machine_number in observed_machines and not storage)\r\n            )\r\n        elif state == STATE_STORED:\r\n            parity_pass = (len(storage) == 1 and not installations) or (\"STORED\" in observed_states and not installations)\r\n        elif state in {STATE_UNKNOWN, STATE_INACTIVE}:\r\n            required = \"INACTIVE\" if state == STATE_INACTIVE else \"UNKNOWN\"\r\n            parity_pass = not installations and not storage and (required in observed_states or not observations)\r\n        elif state == STATE_CONFLICT:\r\n            parity_pass = \"CONFLICTING\" in observed_states and not installations and not storage\r\n        else:\r\n            parity_pass = False\r\n\r\n        location_fields = _join(\r\n            f\"row {number}: date={_text(row.get('Audit Date')) or 'blank'}; machine={_text(row.get('Press/Machine #')) or 'blank'}; \"\r\n            f\"context={_text(row.get('Audit Context')) or 'blank'}; verified={_text(row.get('Physical Audit Verified')) or 'blank'}; \"\r\n            f\"notes={_text(row.get('Notes')) or 'blank'}\"\r\n            for number, row in audited\r\n        )\r\n        records.append({\r\n            \"eoat_identifier\": eoat,\r\n            \"workbook_source\": \"EOAT_Master_Tracker.xlsx\",\r\n            \"sheet\": \"EOAT Inventory\",\r\n            \"rows\": \", \".join(str(number) for number, _ in audited),\r\n            \"workbook_location_fields\": location_fields,\r\n            \"current_database_state\": (\r\n                f\"active installations={len(installations)}{f' ({db_machine})' if db_machine else ''}; \"\r\n                f\"active storage assignments={len(storage)}{f' ({db_storage})' if db_storage else ''}; \"\r\n                f\"authoritative observations={len(observations)} ({', '.join(sorted(observed_states)) or 'none'}); \"\r\n                f\"audit evidence rows={len(audited)}\"\r\n            ),\r\n            \"determined_physical_state\": state,\r\n            \"machine_number\": machine_number,\r\n            \"storage_location\": storage_location,\r\n            \"confidence\": confidence,\r\n            \"evidence\": evidence,\r\n            \"required_database_correction\": correction,\r\n            \"unresolved_ambiguity\": ambiguity,\r\n            \"normalized_location_parity\": \"PASS\" if parity_pass else (\"UNRESOLVED\" if state == STATE_CONFLICT else \"FAIL\"),\r\n        })\r\n\r\n    state_metrics = []\r\n    for state in (STATE_INSTALLED, STATE_STORED, STATE_UNKNOWN, STATE_INACTIVE, STATE_CONFLICT):\r\n        subset = [row for row in records if row[\"determined_physical_state\"] == state]\r\n        passed = sum(row[\"normalized_location_parity\"] == \"PASS\" for row in subset)\r\n        state_metrics.append({\r\n            \"state\": state,\r\n            \"expected\": len(subset),\r\n            \"passed\": passed,\r\n            \"failed_or_unresolved\": len(subset) - passed,\r\n            \"percent\": round(100 * passed / len(subset), 4) if subset else 100.0,\r\n        })\r\n\r\n    machine_assertions = []\r\n    tool_assertions = []\r\n    for _, row in source_rows.items():\r\n        eoat = _text(row.get(\"EOAT Assembly ID\"))\r\n        machine = _machine(row)\r\n        tool = _text(row.get(\"Tool #\"))\r\n        if eoat and machine:\r\n            machine_assertions.append((eoat.casefold(), machine.casefold()))\r\n        if eoat and tool.casefold() not in _MISSING:\r\n            tool_assertions.append((eoat.casefold(), tool.casefold()))\r\n    db_machine_pairs = {\r\n        (_text(row.get(\"eoat_identifier\")).casefold(), _text(row.get(\"machine_number\")).casefold())\r\n        for row in database.get(\"relationships\", {}).get(\"eoat_machine\", [])\r\n    }\r\n    db_tool_pairs = {\r\n        (_text(row.get(\"eoat_identifier\")).casefold(), _text(row.get(\"tool_number\")).casefold())\r\n        for row in database.get(\"relationships\", {}).get(\"eoat_tool\", [])\r\n    }\r\n    machine_pass = sum(pair in db_machine_pairs for pair in machine_assertions)\r\n    tool_pass = sum(pair in db_tool_pairs for pair in tool_assertions)\r\n    verified_records = [row for row in records if row[\"determined_physical_state\"] != STATE_CONFLICT]\r\n    overall_pass = sum(row[\"normalized_location_parity\"] == \"PASS\" for row in verified_records)\r\n    metrics = {\r\n        \"state_metrics\": state_metrics,\r\n        \"installed_eoat_parity\": next(item for item in state_metrics if item[\"state\"] == STATE_INSTALLED),\r\n        \"stored_eoat_parity\": next(item for item in state_metrics if item[\"state\"] == STATE_STORED),\r\n        \"unknown_location_eoat_parity\": next(item for item in state_metrics if item[\"state\"] == STATE_UNKNOWN),\r\n        \"machine_compatibility_parity\": {\r\n            \"source_assertions\": len(machine_assertions), \"unique_source_pairs\": len(set(machine_assertions)),\r\n            \"passed_assertions\": machine_pass, \"percent\": round(100 * machine_pass / len(machine_assertions), 4) if machine_assertions else 100.0,\r\n        },\r\n        \"tool_compatibility_parity\": {\r\n            \"source_assertions\": len(tool_assertions), \"unique_source_pairs\": len(set(tool_assertions)),\r\n            \"passed_assertions\": tool_pass, \"percent\": round(100 * tool_pass / len(tool_assertions), 4) if tool_assertions else 100.0,\r\n        },\r\n        \"overall_current_location_parity\": {\r\n            \"verified_nonconflicting_eoats\": len(verified_records), \"passed\": overall_pass,\r\n            \"failed\": len(verified_records) - overall_pass,\r\n            \"conflicting_excluded_pending_review\": len(records) - len(verified_records),\r\n            \"percent\": round(100 * overall_pass / len(verified_records), 4) if verified_records else 100.0,\r\n        },\r\n        \"conflict_representation_parity\": {\r\n            \"expected\": sum(row[\"determined_physical_state\"] == STATE_CONFLICT for row in records),\r\n            \"passed\": sum(\r\n                row[\"determined_physical_state\"] == STATE_CONFLICT and row[\"normalized_location_parity\"] == \"PASS\"\r\n                for row in records\r\n            ),\r\n        },\r\n    }\r\n    return {\"records\": records, \"metrics\": metrics}\r\nfrom tools.eoat_location_state import (\r\n    STATE_CONFLICT,\r\n    STATE_INSTALLED,\r\n    STATE_STORED,\r\n    STATE_UNKNOWN,\r\n    classify_eoat_locations,\r\n)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _row(eoat, machine, *, notes=\"N/A\", context=\"Installed on Machine\", date=\"2026-06-01\", tool=\"T1\"):\r\n    return {\r\n        \"EOAT Assembly ID\": eoat,\r\n        \"Press/Machine #\": machine,\r\n        \"Tool #\": tool,\r\n        \"Entry Type\": \"Audited\",\r\n        \"Audit Date\": date,\r\n        \"Audit Context\": context,\r\n        \"Physical Audit Verified\": \"Yes\",\r\n        \"Notes\": notes,\r\n    }\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _database(eoats, *, installations=(), storage=(), machine_pairs=(), tool_pairs=()):\r\n    return {\r\n        \"eoats\": [{\"business_identifier\": item, \"is_active\": True, \"status\": \"Active\"} for item in eoats],\r\n        \"relationships\": {\r\n            \"installations\": list(installations),\r\n            \"storage_assignments\": list(storage),\r\n            \"eoat_machine\": [\r\n                {\"eoat_identifier\": eoat, \"machine_number\": machine} for eoat, machine in machine_pairs\r\n            ],\r\n            \"eoat_tool\": [{\"eoat_identifier\": eoat, \"tool_number\": tool} for eoat, tool in tool_pairs],\r\n        },\r\n    }\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_state_aware_classification_does_not_treat_compatibility_as_installation():\r\n    rows = {\r\n        2: _row(\"E-1\", \"1\"),\r\n        3: {**_row(\"E-1\", \"2\"), \"Entry Type\": \"Compatible\", \"Audit Date\": None,\r\n            \"Audit Context\": \"Compatibility row\", \"Physical Audit Verified\": \"No\"},\r\n    }\r\n    report = classify_eoat_locations(\r\n        rows,\r\n        _database([\"E-1\"], machine_pairs=[(\"E-1\", \"1\"), (\"E-1\", \"2\")], tool_pairs=[(\"E-1\", \"T1\")]),\r\n    )\r\n    record = report[\"records\"][0]\r\n    assert record[\"determined_physical_state\"] == STATE_INSTALLED\r\n    assert record[\"machine_number\"] == \"1\"\r\n    assert report[\"metrics\"][\"machine_compatibility_parity\"][\"source_assertions\"] == 2\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_explicit_cabinet_note_overrides_generic_installed_context_without_inventing_cabinet():\r\n    rows = {2: _row(\"E-2\", \"12\", notes=\"EOAT in cabinet.\\nEOAT Not Installed.\")}\r\n    record = classify_eoat_locations(rows, _database([\"E-2\"]))[\"records\"][0]\r\n    assert record[\"determined_physical_state\"] == STATE_STORED\r\n    assert record[\"machine_number\"] == \"\"\r\n    assert \"cabinet identifier not recorded\" in record[\"storage_location\"]\r\n    assert \"note governs\" in record[\"unresolved_ambiguity\"]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_removed_or_not_installed_without_storage_is_unknown():\r\n    rows = {2: _row(\"E-3\", \"13\", notes=\"EOAT was removed from machine before completed.\")}\r\n    record = classify_eoat_locations(rows, _database([\"E-3\"]))[\"records\"][0]\r\n    assert record[\"determined_physical_state\"] == STATE_UNKNOWN\r\n    assert record[\"normalized_location_parity\"] == \"PASS\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_simultaneous_latest_verified_machines_are_conflicting():\r\n    rows = {2: _row(\"E-4\", \"1\"), 3: _row(\"E-4\", \"2\")}\r\n    record = classify_eoat_locations(rows, _database([\"E-4\"]))[\"records\"][0]\r\n    assert record[\"determined_physical_state\"] == STATE_CONFLICT\r\n    assert record[\"normalized_location_parity\"] == \"UNRESOLVED\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_same_physical_eoat_cross_reference_is_an_identity_conflict():\r\n    rows = {\r\n        2: _row(\"E-5\", \"N/A\", context=\"Not Installed / Bench Audit\", notes=\"Same EOAT as tool # 200. EOAT Not Installed.\", tool=\"100\"),\r\n        3: _row(\"E-6\", \"N/A\", context=\"Not Installed / Bench Audit\", notes=\"Same EOAT as tool # 100. EOAT Not Installed.\", tool=\"200\"),\r\n    }\r\n    records = classify_eoat_locations(rows, _database([\"E-5\", \"E-6\"]))[\"records\"]\r\n    assert {record[\"determined_physical_state\"] for record in records} == {STATE_CONFLICT}\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_normalized_parity_requires_matching_install_or_storage_but_unknown_requires_neither():\r\n    rows = {\r\n        2: _row(\"E-7\", \"7\"),\r\n        3: _row(\"E-8\", \"N/A\", context=\"Not Installed / Bench Audit\", notes=\"EOAT in cabinet. EOAT Not Installed.\"),\r\n        4: _row(\"E-9\", \"N/A\", context=\"Not Installed / Bench Audit\", notes=\"EOAT Not Installed.\"),\r\n    }\r\n    database = _database(\r\n        [\"E-7\", \"E-8\", \"E-9\"],\r\n        installations=[{\"eoat_identifier\": \"E-7\", \"machine_number\": \"7\", \"is_current\": 1}],\r\n        storage=[{\"eoat_identifier\": \"E-8\", \"location_code\": \"GENERIC\", \"is_current\": 1}],\r\n    )\r\n    records = classify_eoat_locations(rows, database)[\"records\"]\r\n    assert [record[\"normalized_location_parity\"] for record in records] == [\"PASS\", \"PASS\", \"PASS\"]\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nfrom openpyxl import Workbook\r\n\r\nfrom core.data_gateway.mappings import snapshot_to_bundle\r\nfrom scripts.database.import_eoat_location_observations import build_plan, read_rows\r\n\r\n\r\nHEADERS = [\r\n    \"Audit ID\", \"Audit Date\", \"Entry Type\", \"EOAT Assembly ID\", \"Press/Machine #\",\r\n    \"Audit Context\", \"Physical Audit Verified\", \"Notes\",\r\n]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _workbook(path: Path) -> None:\r\n    book = Workbook()\r\n    sheet = book.active\r\n    sheet.title = \"EOAT Inventory\"\r\n    sheet.append(HEADERS)\r\n    sheet.append([\"A-1\", \"2026-06-18\", \"Audited\", \"EOAT-1\", \"101\", \"Installed on Machine\", \"Yes\", \"\"])\r\n    sheet.append([\"A-2\", \"2026-06-18\", \"Audited\", \"EOAT-2\", \"102\", \"Installed on Machine\", \"Yes\", \"EOAT is in cabinet\"])\r\n    book.save(path)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_observation_plan_is_deterministic_and_keeps_date_only_precision(tmp_path: Path) -> None:\r\n    path = tmp_path / \"EOAT_Master_Tracker.xlsx\"\r\n    _workbook(path)\r\n    database = {\r\n        \"eoats\": [\r\n            {\"business_identifier\": \"EOAT-1\", \"is_active\": True},\r\n            {\"business_identifier\": \"EOAT-2\", \"is_active\": True},\r\n        ],\r\n        \"relationships\": {\"installations\": [], \"storage_assignments\": []},\r\n    }\r\n    first = build_plan(read_rows(path), database, path)\r\n    second = build_plan(read_rows(path), database, path)\r\n    assert first == second\r\n    assert [row[\"state\"] for row in first[\"observations\"]] == [\"INSTALLED\", \"STORED\"]\r\n    assert all(\"observed_on\" in row and \"observed_at\" not in row for row in first[\"observations\"])\r\n    assert first[\"observations\"][1][\"storage_location\"] is None\r\n    assert len(first[\"assertions\"]) == 2\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_client_mapping_keeps_compatibility_separate_from_current_location() -> None:\r\n    bundle = snapshot_to_bundle({\r\n        \"eoats\": [{\r\n            \"business_identifier\": \"EOAT-1\", \"relationships\": [\r\n                {\"relationship_type\": \"machine\", \"identifier\": \"101\"},\r\n                {\"relationship_type\": \"machine\", \"identifier\": \"102\"},\r\n            ],\r\n            \"current_location\": \"STORED â€” cabinet/location unspecified\",\r\n            \"current_location_detail\": {\"state\": \"STORED\", \"source\": \"OBSERVATION\", \"confidence\": \"High\"},\r\n        }],\r\n        \"machines\": [\r\n            {\"machine_number\": \"101\", \"relationships\": [], \"current_eoat\": \"NONE_OBSERVED\"},\r\n            {\"machine_number\": \"102\", \"relationships\": [], \"current_eoat\": \"NONE_OBSERVED\"},\r\n        ],\r\n    })\r\n    assert bundle.eoats[0].machines == (\"101\", \"102\")\r\n    assert ## Assistant
**Timestamp:** 2026-07-20T18:45:21.772Z

The current implementation confirms why the old rollout needs correction: it treats `N/A` as unknown, leaves the Xqual value unnormalized, and turns simultaneous cleanroom observations into conflicts rather than physical units. I’m now reading the authoritative development database and source-row evidence (read-only) to determine the exact split mapping and revised totals.

## Tool Call: exec
**Timestamp:** 2026-07-20T18:45:54.587Z

const r = await tools.shell_command({"command":"@'\nimport json\nfrom scripts.database.production_data_migration import read_env, connect\nids=['P4-EOAT-0029','P4-EOAT-0030','P4-EOAT-0057','CL-EOAT-0050','CL-EOAT-0052','CL-EOAT-0054']\nwith connect(read_env('development')) as c:\n  with c.cursor() as x:\n    x.execute(\"SELECT e.id,e.business_identifier,e.legacy_identifier,e.display_name,e.notes,e.source_import_batch_id FROM eoats e WHERE e.business_identifier IN (\"+','.join(['%s']*len(ids))+\") ORDER BY e.business_identifier\",ids)\n    print('EOATS'); print(json.dumps(x.fetchall(), indent=2, default=str))\n    x.execute(\"\"\"SELECT e.business_identifier,a.id,a.audit_identifier,a.source_row_number,a.audit_date,m.machine_number,a.notes,a.details_json,\n       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Press/Machine #\\\"')) raw_machine,\n       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Audit Context\\\"')) raw_context,\n       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Physical Audit Verified\\\"')) raw_verified,\n       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Notes\\\"')) raw_notes,\n       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Plant/Area\\\"')) raw_area,\n       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Tool #\\\"')) raw_tool\n      FROM audit_records a JOIN eoats e ON e.id=a.eoat_id LEFT JOIN machines m ON m.id=a.machine_id\n      LEFT JOIN import_rows i ON i.source_sheet=a.source_sheet AND i.source_row_number=a.source_row_number\n      WHERE e.business_identifier IN (\"\"\"+','.join(['%s']*len(ids))+\"\"\") ORDER BY e.business_identifier,a.source_row_number\"\"\",ids)\n    print('TARGET_AUDITS'); print(json.dumps(x.fetchall(), indent=2, default=str))\n    x.execute(\"\"\"SELECT i.source_row_number,JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"EOAT Assembly ID\\\"')) eoat,\n       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Audit Date\\\"')) audit_date,\n       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Press/Machine #\\\"')) machine,\n       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Audit Context\\\"')) context,\n       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Physical Audit Verified\\\"')) verified,\n       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Notes\\\"')) notes,\n       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Plant/Area\\\"')) area,\n       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Tool #\\\"')) tool\n      FROM import_rows i WHERE i.source_sheet='EOAT Inventory' AND (\n       LOWER(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Press/Machine #\\\"'))) IN ('n/a','na')\n       OR JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Press/Machine #\\\"'))='26 - Xqual in 25')\n      ORDER BY i.source_row_number\"\"\")\n    print('SPECIAL_MACHINE_ROWS'); print(json.dumps(x.fetchall(), indent=2, default=str))\n    x.execute(\"\"\"SELECT e.business_identifier,a.source_row_number,a.audit_date,\n                 JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Plant/Area\\\"')) area,\n                 JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Press/Machine #\\\"')) raw_machine,\n                 JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Physical Audit Verified\\\"')) verified,\n                 JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Audit Context\\\"')) context\n      FROM audit_records a JOIN eoats e ON e.id=a.eoat_id JOIN import_rows i ON i.source_sheet=a.source_sheet AND i.source_row_number=a.source_row_number\n      WHERE a.source_sheet='EOAT Inventory'\n      ORDER BY e.business_identifier,a.audit_date,a.source_row_number\"\"\")\n    rows=x.fetchall(); print('ALL_AUDIT_LOCATION_TUPLES'); print(json.dumps(rows, indent=2, default=str))\n'@ | python -","timeout_ms":30000,"workdir":"C:\\Users\\kgray\\eoat-atlas-production-location-correction"});
text(typeof r === "string" ? r : JSON.stringify(r));

**Timestamp:** 2026-07-20T18:46:23.463Z

const r = await tools.shell_command({"command":"@'\nimport json\nfrom collections import defaultdict\nfrom scripts.database.production_data_migration import read_env, connect\nids=['P4-EOAT-0029','P4-EOAT-0030','P4-EOAT-0057','CL-EOAT-0050','CL-EOAT-0052','CL-EOAT-0054']\nwith connect(read_env('development')) as c:\n  with c.cursor() as x:\n    x.execute(\"SELECT business_identifier FROM eoats WHERE business_identifier LIKE 'CL-EOAT-%' ORDER BY business_identifier\")\n    print('CLEANROOM_IDENTIFIERS='+json.dumps([r['business_identifier'] for r in x.fetchall()]))\n    x.execute(\"\"\"SELECT e.business_identifier,a.source_row_number,DATE(a.audit_date) audit_date,m.machine_number db_machine,\n      JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Press/Machine #\\\"')) raw_machine,\n      JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Tool #\\\"')) raw_tool,\n      JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Part Family\\\"')) part_family,\n      JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Plant/Area\\\"')) area,\n      JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Audit Context\\\"')) context,\n      JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Physical Audit Verified\\\"')) verified,\n      JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Notes\\\"')) notes\n      FROM audit_records a JOIN eoats e ON e.id=a.eoat_id LEFT JOIN machines m ON a.machine_id=m.id\n      JOIN import_rows i ON i.source_sheet=a.source_sheet AND i.source_row_number=a.source_row_number\n      WHERE e.business_identifier IN (\"\"\"+','.join(['%s']*len(ids))+\"\"\") ORDER BY e.business_identifier,a.source_row_number\"\"\",ids)\n    print('TARGET_TUPLES='+json.dumps(x.fetchall(),indent=2,default=str))\n    x.execute(\"\"\"SELECT i.source_row_number,JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"EOAT Assembly ID\\\"')) eoat,\n      JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Audit Date\\\"')) audit_date,\n      JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Press/Machine #\\\"')) machine,\n      JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Notes\\\"')) notes\n      FROM import_rows i WHERE i.source_sheet='EOAT Inventory' AND LOWER(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Press/Machine #\\\"'))) IN ('n/a','na') ORDER BY i.source_row_number\"\"\")\n    print('NA_ROWS='+json.dumps(x.fetchall(),indent=2,default=str))\n    x.execute(\"\"\"SELECT i.source_row_number,JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"EOAT Assembly ID\\\"')) eoat,\n      JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Audit Date\\\"')) audit_date,\n      JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Press/Machine #\\\"')) machine,\n      JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Entry Type\\\"')) entry_type\n      FROM import_rows i WHERE i.source_sheet='EOAT Inventory' AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(i.raw_values_json,'$.\\\"Press/Machine #\\\"'))='26 - Xqual in 25' ORDER BY i.source_row_number\"\"\")\n    print('XQUAL_ROWS='+json.dumps(x.fetchall(),indent=2,default=str))\n    x.execute(\"\"\"SELECT e.business_identifier,m.machine_number,emc.id FROM eoat_machine_compatibility emc\n                  JOIN eoats e ON e.id=emc.eoat_id JOIN machines m ON m.id=emc.machine_id\n                  WHERE e.business_identifier IN (\"\"\"+','.join(['%s']*len(ids))+\"\"\") ORDER BY e.business_identifier,m.machine_number\"\"\",ids)\n    print('TARGET_MACHINE_COMPAT='+json.dumps(x.fetchall(),indent=2,default=str))\n    x.execute(\"\"\"SELECT e.business_identifier,t.business_identifier tool, etc.id FROM eoat_tool_compatibility etc\n                  JOIN eoats e ON e.id=etc.eoat_id JOIN tools t ON t.id=etc.tool_id\n                  WHERE e.business_identifier IN (\"\"\"+','.join(['%s']*len(ids))+\"\"\") ORDER BY e.business_identifier,t.business_identifier\"\"\",ids)\n    print('TARGET_TOOL_COMPAT='+json.dumps(x.fetchall(),indent=2,default=str))\n'@ | python -","timeout_ms":30000,"workdir":"C:\\Users\\kgray\\eoat-atlas-production-location-correction"});

const r = await tools.shell_command({"command":"@'\nimport json\nfrom scripts.database.production_data_migration import read_env, connect\nwith connect(read_env('development')) as c:\n  with c.cursor() as x:\n    x.execute(\"\"\"SELECT source_row_number,raw_values_json,normalized_values_json,target_entity_type,target_entity_id,status,error_summary\n               FROM import_rows WHERE source_sheet='EOAT Inventory' AND source_row_number=37\"\"\")\n    print(json.dumps(x.fetchall(),indent=2,default=str))\n    x.execute(\"\"\"SELECT e.business_identifier,o.id,o.state,m.machine_number,o.source_row_number,o.original_source_wording,o.confidence,o.resolution_status\n      FROM eoat_location_observations o JOIN eoats e ON e.id=o.eoat_id LEFT JOIN machines m ON m.id=o.machine_id ORDER BY e.business_identifier\"\"\")\n    print('OBSERVATIONS'); print(json.dumps(x.fetchall(),indent=2,default=str))\n    x.execute(\"\"\"SELECT e.business_identifier,a.id,a.state,m.machine_number,a.source_row_number,a.original_source_wording,a.participates_in_conflict\n      FROM eoat_location_assertions a JOIN eoats e ON e.id=a.eoat_id LEFT JOIN machines m ON m.id=a.machine_id\n      WHERE e.business_identifier IN ('CL-EOAT-0050','CL-EOAT-0052','CL-EOAT-0054','P4-EOAT-0029','P4-EOAT-0030','P4-EOAT-0057')\n      ORDER BY e.business_identifier,a.source_row_number\"\"\")\n    print('TARGET_ASSERTIONS'); print(json.dumps(x.fetchall(),indent=2,default=str))\n'@ | python -","timeout_ms":30000,"workdir":"C:\\Users\\kgray\\eoat-atlas-production-location-correction"});

\"seed-parity-report.json\", parity)\r\n        write_json(output / \"excluded-data-report.json\", excluded_report)\r\n        write_json(output / \"file-reference-report.json\", file_report)\r\n {\r\n            \"manifest_version\": 1,\r\n            \"migration_id\": migration_id,\r\n            \"source_database\": {\r\n                \"host\": source_values.get(\"EOAT_DB_HOST\", \"127.0.0.1\"),\r\n                \"port\": int(source_values.get(\"EOAT_DB_PORT\", \"3306\")),\r\n                \"database\": source_identity[\"database_name\"],\r\n                \"mysql_version\": source_identity[\"server_version\"],\r\n                \"alembic_revision\": source_identity[\"alembic_revision\"],\r\n                \"credentials_included\": False,\r\n            },\r\n            \"source_git\": git,\r\n            # Source checkouts intentionally do not track generated release_metadata.json.\r\n            \"source_application\": asdict(get_version_info(repo)),\r\n            \"source_database_latest_application_release\": database_release,\r\n            \"export_timestamp_utc\": args.export_timestamp or utc_now(),\r\n            \"export_utility_version\": TOOL_VERSION,\r\n            \"artifact_filename\": sql_path.name,\r\n            \"artifact_sha256\": digest,\r\n            \"required_production_schema_revision\": REQUIRED_REVISION,\r\n            \"table_classifications\": classification,\r\n            \"table_order\": order,\r\n            \"per_table_exported_row_counts\": exported_counts,\r\n            \"total_exported_rows\": sum(exported_counts.values()),\r\n            \"explicit_exclusions\": excluded_report[\"excluded_tables\"],\r\n            \"expected_post_import_counts\": expected_counts,\r\n            \"foreign_key_checks_temporarily_disabled\": True,\r\n            \"foreign_key_checks_reason\": \"Self-references and deterministic cross-table ordering; explicit orphan validation is mandatory.\",\r\n            \"import_marker\": marker_key,\r\n        }\r\n        write_json(output / \"migration-manifest.json\", manifest)\r\n        shutil.copy2(Path(__file__), output / \"migration_tool.py\")\r\n        validation_md = f\"\"\"# Operational-data migration validation\r\n\r\n- Source schema revision: `{source_identity['alembic_revision']}` (PASS)\r\n- Disposable production baseline revision: `{baseline_identity['alembic_revision']}` (PASS)\r\n- Classified tables: {len(classification)} of {len(source_tables)} (PASS)\r\n- Seed conflicts: 0 (PASS)\r\n- Exported rows: {sum(exported_counts.values())}\r\n- Artifact SHA-256: `{digest}`\r\n- Credential/secret scan: PASS\r\n- Development authentication/session data excluded: PASS\r\n- File references inspected: {file_report['total_document_references']}\r\n\r\nDisposable import, integrity, parity, and API read-smoke results are written by `migration_tool.py validate-database`.\r\n\"\"\"\r\n        (output / \"validation-report.md\").write_text(validation_md, encoding=\"utf-8\")\r\n        write_instructions(output, manifest)\r\n    print(json.dumps({\"status\": \"PASS\", \"output_directory\": str(output), \"sha256\": digest}, indent=2))\r\n    return 0\r\n\r\n\r\ndef write_instructions(output: Path, manifest: dict[str, Any]) -> None:\r\n    migration_id = manifest[\"migration_id\"]\r\n    digest = manifest[\"artifact_sha256\"]\r\n    release_evidence_dir = str(manifest.get(\"source_git\", {}).get(\"commit\") or \"uncommitted\")[:7]\r\n    import_text = f\"\"\"# EOAT Atlas controlled operational-data import\r\n\r\nThese commands are documentation only. Run them interactively on EOAT-ATLAS as an authorized operator. The database login paths must be created beforehand with `mysql_config_editor`; never place passwords on a command line.\r\n\r\n```bash\r\nset -euo pipefail\r\nPACKAGE=/opt/eoat-atlas/incoming/{migration_id}\r\ncd \"$PACKAGE\"\r\nsha256sum -c operational-data.sql.sha256\r\n/opt/eoat-atlas/current/venv/bin/python migration_tool.py verify-package --package-directory \"$PACKAGE\"\r\ntest \"$(mysql --login-path=eoat-atlas-prod-runtime --batch --skip-column-names eoat_atlas_prod -e 'SELECT version_num FROM alembic_version')\" = \"{REQUIRED_REVISION}\"\r\n\r\nSTAMP=$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)\r\nBACKUP=/opt/eoat-atlas/shared/backups/eoat_atlas_prod-pre-operational-import-$STAMP.sql\r\nmysqldump --login-path=eoat-atlas-prod-admin --single-transaction --no-tablespaces --routines --triggers --events --hex-blob --set-gtid-purged=OFF eoat_atlas_prod > \"$BACKUP\"\r\nsha256sum \"$BACKUP\" | tee \"$BACKUP.sha256\"\r\ntest -s \"$BACKUP\"\r\n\r\nVALIDATION_DB=eoat_atlas_validation_{migration_id[-8:]}\r\nmysql --login-path=eoat-atlas-prod-admin -e \"CREATE DATABASE \\\\`$VALIDATION_DB\\\\` CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci\"\r\nEOAT_DB_NAME=\"$VALIDATION_DB\" /opt/eoat-atlas/current/venv/bin/python -m alembic -c /opt/eoat-atlas/current/server/alembic.ini upgrade {REQUIRED_REVISION}\r\nmysql --login-path=eoat-atlas-prod-admin \"$VALIDATION_DB\" < operational-data.sql\r\nEOAT_DB_NAME=\"$VALIDATION_DB\" /opt/eoat-atlas/current/venv/bin/python migration_tool.py validate-database --package-directory \"$PACKAGE\"\r\nPYTHONPATH=/opt/eoat-atlas/current EOAT_DB_NAME=\"$VALIDATION_DB\" /opt/eoat-atlas/current/venv/bin/python migration_tool.py api-smoke --package-directory \"$PACKAGE\"\r\nmysqlcheck --login-path=eoat-atlas-prod-admin --check --extended \"$VALIDATION_DB\"\r\nmysql --login-path=eoat-atlas-prod-admin -e \"DROP DATABASE \\\\`$VALIDATION_DB\\\\`\"\r\n\r\n# Current-location and compatibility relationship parity pass. Strict overall parity remains blocking\r\n# until the documented workbook-metadata fields and unresolved legacy import issues are corrected or\r\n# accepted by the named data owner. Preserve the approval as permanent evidence.\r\ntest -s \"$PACKAGE/PARITY_GO_NO_GO_APPROVAL.txt\"\r\ngrep -Fx \"APPROVED {migration_id} FOR PRODUCTION IMPORT\" \"$PACKAGE/PARITY_GO_NO_GO_APPROVAL.txt\"\r\n\r\nEXPECTED='IMPORT {migration_id} INTO eoat_atlas_prod'\r\nread -r -p \"Type exactly: $EXPECTED: \" CONFIRM\r\ntest \"$CONFIRM\" = \"$EXPECTED\"\r\ntest \"$(sha256sum operational-data.sql | awk '{{print $1}}')\" = \"{digest}\"\r\nmysql --login-path=eoat-atlas-prod-admin eoat_atlas_prod < operational-data.sql\r\nEOAT_DB_NAME=eoat_atlas_prod /opt/eoat-atlas/current/venv/bin/python migration_tool.py validate-database --package-directory \"$PACKAGE\"\r\nPYTHONPATH=/opt/eoat-atlas/current EOAT_DB_NAME=eoat_atlas_prod /opt/eoat-atlas/current/venv/bin/python migration_tool.py api-smoke --package-directory \"$PACKAGE\"\r\nmysqlcheck --login-path=eoat-atlas-prod-admin --check --extended eoat_atlas_prod\r\n\r\nPOST=/opt/eoat-atlas/shared/backups/eoat_atlas_prod-post-operational-import-$STAMP.sql\r\nmysqldump --login-path=eoat-atlas-prod-admin --single-transaction --no-tablespaces --routines --triggers --events --hex-blob --set-gtid-purged=OFF eoat_atlas_prod > \"$POST\"\r\nsha256sum \"$POST\" | tee \"$POST.sha256\"\r\ninstall -m 0640 disposable-validation-report.json /opt/eoat-atlas/shared/releases/{release_evidence_dir}/production-data-import-$STAMP.json\r\n```\r\n\r\nDo not start the API and do not change systemd, Nginx, or runtime configuration in this procedure. The persistent marker `{manifest['import_marker']}` and exact baseline-count guard refuse duplicate or non-baseline imports. An `IN_PROGRESS` marker indicates an interrupted attempt and requires evidence preservation plus rollback, not a blind retry.\r\n\"\"\"\r\n    rollback_text = f\"\"\"# EOAT Atlas controlled rollback\r\n\r\nUse the exact pre-import backup created by the import procedure. Never delete or overwrite it.\r\n\r\n```bash\r\nset -euo pipefail\r\nBACKUP=/opt/eoat-atlas/shared/backups/eoat_atlas_prod-pre-operational-import-REPLACE_WITH_STAMP.sql\r\ntest -s \"$BACKUP\"\r\ntest -s \"$BACKUP.sha256\"\r\ncd \"$(dirname \"$BACKUP\")\"\r\nsha256sum -c \"$(basename \"$BACKUP\").sha256\"\r\n\r\nRESTORE_CHECK=eoat_atlas_restore_check_{migration_id[-8:]}\r\nmysql --login-path=eoat-atlas-prod-admin -e \"CREATE DATABASE \\\\`$RESTORE_CHECK\\\\` CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci\"\r\nmysql --login-path=eoat-atlas-prod-admin \"$RESTORE_CHECK\" < \"$BACKUP\"\r\ntest \"$(mysql --login-path=eoat-atlas-prod-admin --batch --skip-column-names \"$RESTORE_CHECK\" -e 'SELECT version_num FROM alembic_version')\" = \"{REQUIRED_REVISION}\"\r\nmysqlcheck --login-path=eoat-atlas-prod-admin --check --extended \"$RESTORE_CHECK\"\r\nmysql --login-path=eoat-atlas-prod-admin -e \"DROP DATABASE \\\\`$RESTORE_CHECK\\\\`\"\r\n\r\nEXPECTED='RESTORE eoat_atlas_prod FROM VERIFIED PRE-IMPORT BACKUP'\r\nread -r -p \"Type exactly: $EXPECTED: \" CONFIRM\r\ntest \"$CONFIRM\" = \"$EXPECTED\"\r\nFAILED=/opt/eoat-atlas/shared/backups/eoat_atlas_prod-failed-import-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ).sql\r\nmysqldump --login-path=eoat-atlas-prod-admin --single-transaction --no-tablespaces --routines --triggers --events --hex-blob --set-gtid-purged=OFF eoat_atlas_prod > \"$FAILED\"\r\nsha256sum \"$FAILED\" > \"$FAILED.sha256\"\r\nmysql --login-path=eoat-atlas-prod-admin -e 'DROP DATABASE eoat_atlas_prod; CREATE DATABASE eoat_atlas_prod CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci'\r\nmysql --login-path=eoat-atlas-prod-admin eoat_atlas_prod < \"$BACKUP\"\r\ntest \"$(mysql --login-path=eoat-atlas-prod-admin --batch --skip-column-names eoat_atlas_prod -e 'SELECT version_num FROM alembic_version')\" = \"{REQUIRED_REVISION}\"\r\nmysqlcheck --login-path=eoat-atlas-prod-admin --check --extended eoat_atlas_prod\r\n```\r\n\r\nStop immediately if the backup or checksum is absent or invalid. Preserve the failed-state dump, package, validation reports, and logs.\r\n\"\"\"\r\n    (output / \"IMPORT_INSTRUCTIONS.md\").write_text(import_text, encoding=\"utf-8\")\r\n    (output / \"ROLLBACK_INSTRUCTIONS.md\").write_text(rollback_text, encoding=\"utf-8\")\r\n\r\n\r\ndef verify_package(package: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:\r\n    manifest = json.loads((package / \"migration-manifest.json\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\r\n    artifact = package / manifest[\"artifact_filename\"]\r\n    actual = hashlib.sha256(artifact.read_bytes()).hexdigest()\r\n    if actual != manifest[\"artifact_sha256\"]:\r\n        raise RuntimeError(f\"Artifact checksum mismatch: expected {manifest['artifact_sha256']}, actual {actual}\")\r\n    if manifest[\"required_production_schema_revision\"] != REQUIRED_REVISION:\r\n        raise RuntimeError(\"Manifest target revision is not approved\")\r\n    if secret_findings(artifact.read_bytes()):\r\n        raise RuntimeError(\"Artifact secret scan failed\")\r\n    return {\"status\": \"PASS\", \"artifact_sha256\": actual, \"migration_id\": manifest[\"migration_id\"]}\r\n\r\n\r\ndef orphan_checks(connection) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:\r\n    meta = schema_metadata(connection)\r\n    results = []\r\n    with connection.cursor() as cursor:\r\n        for table in sorted(meta):\r\n            for fk in meta[table][\"foreign_keys\"]:\r\n                column = fk[\"COLUMN_NAME\"]\r\n                parent = fk[\"REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME\"]\r\n                parent_column = fk[\"REFERENCED_COLUMN_NAME\"]\r\n                cursor.execute(\r\n                    f\"SELECT COUNT(*) count FROM `{table}` child LEFT JOIN `{parent}` parent \"\r\n                    f\"ON child.`{column}`=parent.`{parent_column}` WHERE child.`{column}` IS NOT NULL \"\r\n                    f\"AND parent.`{parent_column}` IS NULL\"\r\n                )\r\n                results.append({\r\n                    \"table\": table, \"column\": column, \"parent_table\": parent,\r\n                    \"constraint\": fk[\"CONSTRAINT_NAME\"], \"orphan_count\": int(cursor.fetchone()[\"count\"]),\r\n                })\r\n    return results\r\n\r\n\r\ndef duplicate_checks(conn…24 tokens truncated…mns\", = response.status_code\r\n        response = client.get(\"/api/v1/compatibility/alternatives\", params={\r\n            \"eoat_identifier\": e, \"machine_number\": m, \"tool_number\": t,\r\n        })\r\n        checks[\"compatibility_alternatives\"] = response.status_code\r\n    status = \"PASS\" if checks and all(code == 200 for code in checks.values()) else \"FAIL\"\r\n    report = {\"status\": status, \"checks\": checks, \"live_api_started\": False, \"validated_at_utc\": utc_now()}\r\n    write_json(package / \"api-read-smoke-report.json\", report)\r\n    print(json.dumps(report, indent=2))\r\n    return 0 if status == \"PASS\" else 1\r\n\r\n\r\ndef parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:\r\n    root = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\"Build and validate the EOAT Atlas production operational-data migration\")\r\n    report.source_rows = {\"EOAT Inventory\": len(inventory_rows), \"Photo Index\": len(photo_rows)}\r\n    metadata = {\r\n        str(key): _text(value)\r\n        for key, value in workbook[\"_EOAT_App_Metadata\"].iter_rows(min_row=2, values_only=True)\r\n        if key\r\n    }\r\n    report.workbook_schema_version = metadata.get(\"schema_version\", \"\")\r\n\r\n    plants: set[str] = set()\r\n    areas: set[tuple[str, str]] = set()\r\n    eoats: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}\r\n    machines: set[tuple[str, str]] = set()\r\n    tools: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}\r\n    eoat_machine: set[tuple[str, str, str]] = set()\r\n    eoat_tool: set[tuple[str, str]] = set()\r\n    tool_machine: set[tuple[str, str, str]] = set()\r\n    audit_ids: list[str] = []\r\n    audited_locations: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)\r\n    rejected_source_rows: set[int] = set()\r\n    part_candidates: set[tuple[str, str]] = set()\r\n\r\n    for row_number, row in inventory_rows:\r\n        plant_code = _canonical_area(row.get(\"Plant/Area\"))\r\n        area_name = _text(row.get(\"Plant/Area\")) or \"Unknown\"\r\n        plants.add(\"P4\")\r\n        areas.add((\"P4\", area_name))\r\n        eoat_id = _text(row.get(\"EOAT Assembly ID\"))\r\n        audit_id = _text(row.get(\"Audit ID\"))\r\n        machine = _text(row.get(\"Press/Machine #\"))\r\n        tool_number = _text(row.get(\"Tool #\"))\r\n        entry_type = _text(row.get(\"Entry Type\"))\r\n\r\n        if audit_id:\r\n            audit_ids.append(audit_id)\r\n        else:\r\n            report.add_issue(\r\n                _issue(\r\n                    \"ERROR\",\r\n                    \"MISSING_AUDIT_ID\",\r\n                    \"EOAT Inventory\",\r\n                    row_number,\r\n                    \"Audit ID\",\r\n                    None,\r\n                    \"The row has no traceable audit identifier.\",\r\n                    \"Assign a unique Audit ID.\",\r\n                )\r\n            )\r\n            rejected_source_rows.add(row_number)\r\n        if not eoat_id:\r\n            report.add_issue(\r\n                _issue(\r\n                    \"ERROR\",\r\n                    \"MISSING_EOAT_IDENTIFIER\",\r\n                    \"EOAT Inventory\",\r\n                    row_number,\r\n                    \"EOAT Assembly ID\",\r\n                    None,\r\n                    \"The row cannot be associated with an EOAT.\",\r\n                    \"Assign or recover the EOAT business identifier.\",\r\n                )\r\n            )\r\n            rejected_source_rows.add(row_number)\r\n            continue\r\n\r\n        eoat_candidate = {\r\n            \"business_identifier\": eoat_id,\r\n            \"eoat_type\": _text(row.get(\"EOAT Type\")),\r\n            \"connection_type\": _text(row.get(\"Connection Type\")),\r\n            \"cleanroom_classification\": _text(row.get(\"Cleanroom/Non-Cleanroom\")),\r\n            \"number_of_parts_picked\": _text(row.get(\"Number of Parts Picked\")),\r\n            \"number_of_vacuum_cups\": _text(row.get(\"# of Cups\")),\r\n            \"number_of_grippers\": _text(row.get(\"# of Grippers\")),\r\n            \"notes\": _text(row.get(\"Notes\")),\r\n            \"source_row\": row_number,\r\n        }\r\n        prior = eoats.get(eoat_id)\r\n        if prior:\r\n            conflicting = [\r\n                key\r\n                for key in (\"eoat_type\", \"connection_type\", \"cleanroom_classification\")\r\n                if prior.get(key) and eoat_candidate.get(key) and prior[key] != eoat_candidate[key]\r\n            ]\r\n            if conflicting:\r\n                report.add_issue(\r\n                    _issue(\r\n                        \"WARNING\",\r\n                        \"CONFLICTING_EOAT_ATTRIBUTES\",\r\n                        \"EOAT Inventory\",\r\n                        row_number,\r\n                        \", \".join(conflicting),\r\n                        eoat_id,\r\n                        \"Repeated EOAT rows disagree on stable profile attributes.\",\r\n                        \"Review the named fields and choose authoritative values before import.\",\r\n                    )\r\n                )\r\n        else:\r\n            eoats[eoat_id] = eoat_candidate\r\n\r\n        if machine and not _missing(machine):\r\n            if MACHINE_PATTERN.fullmatch(machine):\r\n                machines.add((plant_code, machine))\r\n                eoat_machine.add((eoat_id, plant_code, machine))\r\n                if tool_number and not _missing(tool_number):\r\n                    tool_machine.add((tool_number, plant_code, machine))\r\n                if entry_type.casefold() == \"audited\":\r\n                    audited_locations[eoat_id].add(f\"{plant_code}:{machine}\")\r\n            else:\r\n                report.add_issue(\r\n                    _issue(\r\n                        \"WARNING\",\r\n                        \"AMBIGUOUS_MACHINE_NUMBER\",\r\n                        \"EOAT Inventory\",\r\n                        row_number,\r\n                        \"Press/Machine #\",\r\n                        machine,\r\n                        \"Machine value contains qualifiers or multiple meanings and cannot be normalized safely.\",\r\n                        \"Replace with one canonical machine number and retain the qualifier in notes.\",\r\n                    )\r\n                )\r\n        else:\r\n            report.add_issue(\r\n                _issue(\r\n                    \"WARNING\",\r\n                    \"MISSING_MACHINE\",\r\n                    \"EOAT Inventory\",\r\n                    row_number,\r\n                    \"Press/Machine #\",\r\n                    machine,\r\n                    \"No machine relationship can be created for this row.\",\r\n                    \"Confirm whether the EOAT is in storage or the machine value is missing.\",\r\n                )\r\n            )\r\n\r\n        if tool_number and not _missing(tool_number):\r\n            tools.setdefault(\r\n                tool_number, {\"business_identifier\": tool_number, \"tool_number\": tool_number, \"source_row\": row_number}\r\n            )\r\n            eoat_tool.add((eoat_id, tool_number))\r\n        else:\r\n            report.add_issue(\r\n                _issue(\r\n                    \"WARNING\",\r\n                    \"MISSING_TOOL\",\r\n                    \"EOAT Inventory\",\r\n                    row_number,\r\n                    \"Tool #\",\r\n                    tool_number,\r\n                    \"No tool relationship can be created for this row.\",\r\n                    \"Confirm the tool number or explicitly mark the row as not tool-specific.\",\r\n                )\r\n            )\r\n\r\n        part_name = _text(row.get(\"Part Name/Description\"))\r\n        if part_name:\r\n            part_candidates.add((tool_number, part_name))\r\n\r\n        for field_name in (\r\n            \"Sensors Present?\",\r\n            \"Vacuum Confirmation Present?\",\r\n            \"Part-Present Detection Present?\",\r\n            \"Quick Disconnects Present?\",\r\n        ):\r\n            value = _text(row.get(field_name))\r\n            if value and value.casefold() not in {\r\n                \"yes\",\r\n                \"no\",\r\n                \"y\",\r\n                \"n\",\r\n                \"true\",\r\n                \"false\",\r\n                \"present\",\r\n                \"not present\",\r\n                *MISSING_TOKENS,\r\n            }:\r\n                report.add_issue(\r\n                    _issue(\r\n                        \"WARNING\",\r\n                        \"INVALID_BOOLEAN\",\r\n                        \"EOAT Inventory\",\r\n                        row_number,\r\n                        field_name,\r\n                        value,\r\n                        \"Boolean-like value is outside the accepted mapping vocabulary.\",\r\n                        \"Map it explicitly to true, false, or unknown.\",\r\n                    )\r\n                )\r\n\r\n    duplicate_audits = sum(count - 1 for count in Counter(audit_ids).values() if count > 1)\r\n    report.duplicate_counts[\"audit_identifiers\"] = duplicate_audits\r\n    if duplicate_audits:\r\n        report.add_issue(\r\n            _issue(\r\n                \"ERROR\",\r\n                \"DUPLICATE_AUDIT_IDENTIFIER\",\r\n                \"EOAT Inventory\",\r\n                None,\r\n                \"Audit ID\",\r\n                duplicate_audits,\r\n                \"Audit IDs are not unique.\",\r\n                \"Assign unique audit identifiers while preserving the original value in import provenance.\",\r\n            )\r\n        )\r\n\r\n    for eoat_id, locations in sorted(audited_locations.items()):\r\n        if len(locations) > 1:\r\n            report.add_issue(\r\n                _issue(\r\n                    \"WARNING\",\r\n                    \"CONFLICTING_CURRENT_ASSIGNMENT\",\r\n                    \"EOAT Inventory\",\r\n                    None,\r\n                    \"Press/Machine #\",\r\n                    \", \".join(sorted(locations)),\r\n                    f\"{eoat_id} has multiple audited machine assignments and no explicit removal timeline.\",\r\n                    \"Review audit dates and create approved installation-history intervals; do not infer a current location automatically.\",\r\n                )\r\n            )\r\n\r\n    if part_candidates:\r\n        report.add_issue(\r\n            _issue(\r\n                \"WARNING\",\r\n                \"PART_IDENTIFIER_AMBIGUITY\",\r\n                \"EOAT Inventory\",\r\n                None,\r\n                \"Part Name/Description\",\r\n                len(part_candidates),\r\n                \"The workbook contains part names but no independent Part Number field; Tool # cannot safely be assumed to be the part number.\",\r\n                \"Provide a part-number crosswalk before importing parts and tool_parts.\",\r\n            )\r\n        )\r\n\r\n    photo_ids: list[str] = []\r\n    project_root = source.parents[2]\r\n    documents: set[str] = set()\r\n        \"\"\", {\"batch_id\": batch_id})\r\n        document_links = rows_as_dicts(connection, \"\"\"\r\n            SELECT dl.id,dl.document_id,dl.entity_type,dl.entity_id,\r\n                   CASE dl.entity_type\r\n                       WHEN 'eoat' THEN (SELECT business_identifier FROM eoats WHERE id=dl.entity_id)\r\n                       WHEN 'tool' THEN (SELECT tool_number FROM tools WHERE id=dl.entity_id)\r\n                       WHEN 'machine' THEN (SELECT machine_number FROM machines WHERE id=dl.entity_id)\r\n                       ELSE CAST(dl.entity_id AS CHAR)\r\n                   END AS entity_identifier\r\n            FROM document_links dl\r\n        \"\"\")\r\n        history = rows_as_dicts(connection, \"\"\"\r\n            SELECT id,entity_type,entity_id,occurred_at,summary,reason,previous_values_json,new_values_json,metadata_json\r\n            FROM entity_history_events ORDER BY id\r\n        \"\"\")\r\n        audit_log = rows_as_dicts(connection, \"\"\"\r\n            SELECT id,entity_type,entity_id,occurred_at,action,previous_values_json,new_values_json,changed_fields_json,\r\n                   reason,source,success FROM change_audit_log ORDER BY id\r\n        \"\"\")\r\n        database_only_extras = []\r\n        for entity_type, query in (\r\n            (\"tag\", \"SELECT id,tag_code AS business_key FROM tags\"),\r\n            (\"annotation\", \"SELECT id,annotation_uuid AS business_key FROM annotations\"),\r\n            (\"annotation_target\", \"SELECT id,target_uuid AS business_key FROM annotation_targets\"),\r\n            (\"entity_tag\", \"SELECT id,COALESCE(source_record_identifier,CONCAT(entity_type,':',entity_id,':',tag_id)) AS business_key FROM entity_tags\"),\r\n            (\"maintenance_event\", \"SELECT id,event_uuid AS business_key FROM maintenance_events\"),\r\n        ):\r\n            if table_exists(connection, query.split(\" FROM \", 1)[1].split()[0]):\r\n                for record in rows_as_dicts(connection, query):\r\n                    database_only_extras.append({\"entity_type\": entity_type, **record})\r\n        counts = {}\r\n        for item in rows_as_dicts(connection, \"\"\"\r\n            SELECT table_name AS name FROM information_schema.tables\r\n            WHERE table_schema=DATABASE() AND table_type='BASE TABLE' ORDER BY table_name\r\n        \"\"\"):\r\n            name = item[\"name\"]\r\n            counts[name] = int(scalar(connection, f\"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `{name}`\") or 0)\r\n        duplicate_database_keys = []\r\n        for table, column, pk in (\r\n            (\"eoats\", \"business_identifier\", \"id\"), (\"machines\", \"machine_number\", \"id\"),\r\n            (\"tools\", \"tool_number\", \"id\"), (\"audit_records\", \"audit_identifier\", \"id\"),\r\n            (\"documents\", \"document_number\", \"id\"),\r\n        ):\r\n            duplicate_database_keys.extend(rows_as_dicts(connection, f\"\"\"\r\n                SELECT '{table}' AS `table`,'{column}' AS `column`,CAST(`{column}` AS CHAR) AS `key`,\r\n                       COUNT(*) AS `count`,GROUP_CONCAT(`{pk}` ORDER BY `{pk}`) AS primary_keys\r\n                FROM `{table}` WHERE `{column}` IS NOT NULL\r\n                GROUP BY `{column}` HAVING COUNT(*)>1\r\n            \"\"\"))\r\n        foreign_keys = rows_as_dicts(connection, \"\"\"\r\n            SELECT k.table_name AS table_name,k.column_name AS column_name,\r\n                   k.referenced_table_name AS referenced_table_name,\r\n                   k.referenced_column_name AS referenced_column_name,k.constraint_name AS constraint_name\r\n            FROM information_schema.key_column_usage k\r\n            WHERE k.table_schema=DATABASE() AND k.referenced_table_name IS NOT NULL\r\n            ORDER BY k.table_name,k.constraint_name,k.ordinal_position\r\n        \"\"\")\r\n        orphan_checks = []\r\n        for fk in foreign_keys:\r\n            count = int(scalar(connection, f\"\"\"\r\n                SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `{fk['table_name']}` c\r\n                LEFT JOIN `{fk['referenced_table_name']}` p\r\n                  ON c.`{fk['column_name']}`=p.`{fk['referenced_column_name']}`\r\n                WHERE c.`{fk['column_name']}` IS NOT NULL AND p.`{fk['referenced_column_name']}` IS NULL\r\n            \"\"\") or 0)\r\n            orphan_checks.append(fk | {\"orphan_count\": count, \"status\": \"PASS\" if count == 0 else \"FAIL\"})\r\n    engine.dispose()\r\n    return {\r\n        \"info\": info, \"batch\": batch, \"import_rows\": import_rows, \"issues\": issues, \"eoats\": eoats,\r\n        \"audits\": audits, \"machines\": machines, \"tools\": tools, \"relationships\": relationships, \"photos\": photos,\r\n        \"document_links\": document_links, \"history\": history, \"audit_log\": audit_log, \"counts\": counts,\r\n        \"duplicate_database_keys\": duplicate_database_keys, \"orphan_checks\": orphan_checks,\r\n        \"database_only_extras\": database_only_extras,\r\n    }\r\n\r\n\r\ndef duplicate_source_keys(rows: dict[str, dict[int, dict[str, Any]]]) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:\r\n    output = []\r\n    for sheet, field in ((\"EOAT Inventory\", \"Audit ID\"), (\"Photo Index\", \"Photo ID\")):\r\n        grouped: dict[str, list[int]] = defaultdict(list)\r\n        for row_number, record in rows.get(sheet, {}).items():\r\n            key = clean_text(record.get(field))\r\n            if key:\r\n                grouped[normalized_value(key)].append(row_number)\r\n        for key, source_rows in grouped.items():\r\n            if len(source_rows) > 1:\r\n                output.append({\r\n                    \"sheet\": sheet, \"key_type\": field, \"key\": key, \"count\": len(source_rows),\r\n                    \"source_rows\": json.dumps(source_rows),\r\n                })\r\n    return output\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _indexed(records: list[dict[str, Any]], key: str) -> dict[str, list[dict[str, Any]]]:\r\n    result: dict[str, list[dict[str, Any]]] = defaultdict(list)\r\n    for record in records:\r\n        value = clean_text(record.get(key))\r\n        if value:\r\n            result[normalized_value(value)].append(record)\r\n    return result\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _direct_database_value(\r\n    sheet: str,\r\n    header: str,\r\n    source: dict[str, Any],\r\n    indexes: dict[str, dict[str, list[dict[str, Any]]]],\r\n) -> tuple[str, Any, int | None, int]:\r\n    if sheet == \"EOAT Inventory\":\r\n        audit_key = normalized_value(source.get(\"Audit ID\"))\r\n        eoat_key = normalized_value(source.get(\"EOAT Assembly ID\"))\r\n        audits = indexes[\"audits\"].get(audit_key, [])\r\n        eoats = indexes[\"eoats\"].get(eoat_key, [])\r\n        audit_fields = {\r\n            \"Audit ID\": \"audit_identifier\", \"Audit Date\": \"audit_date\", \"Notes\": \"notes\",\r\n        }\r\n        eoat_fields = {\r\n            \"EOAT Assembly ID\": \"business_identifier\", \"Number of Parts Picked\": \"number_of_parts_picked\",\r\n            \"# of Cups\": \"number_of_vacuum_cups\", \"# of Grippers\": \"number_of_grippers\",\r\n            \"Sensors Present?\": \"sensors_present\", \"Part-Present Detection Present?\": \"part_present_sensor_present\",\r\n            \"Vacuum Confirmation Present?\": \"vacuum_confirmation_sensor_present\",\r\n            \"Quick Disconnects Present?\": \"quick_disconnect_present\", \"Cup Type/Material\": \"cup_material\",\r\n        }\r\n        if header in audit_fields:\r\n            return \"audit_records\", audits[0].get(audit_fields[header]) if len(audits) == 1 else None, (\r\n                audits[0][\"id\"] if len(audits) == 1 else None\r\n            ), len(audits)\r\n        if header in eoat_fields:\r\n            return \"eoats\", eoats[0].get(eoat_fields[header]) if len(eoats) == 1 else None, (\r\n                eoats[0][\"id\"] if len(eoats) == 1 else None\r\n            ), len(eoats)\r\n    if sheet == \"Photo Index\":\r\n        photo_key = normalized_value(source.get(\"Photo ID\"))\r\n        photos = indexes[\"photos\"].get(photo_key, [])\r\n        fields = {\r\n            \"Photo ID\": \"document_number\", \"Date Taken\": \"captured_at\", \"Photo Filename\": \"file_name\",\r\n            \"Stored Filename\": \"file_name\", \"Description\": \"caption\", \"Notes\": \"description\",\r\n        }\r\n        if header in fields:\r\n            return \"documents/photos\", photos[0].get(fields[header]) if len(photos) == 1 else None, (\r\n                photos[0].get(\"photo_id\") if len(photos) == 1 else None\r\n            ), len(photos)\r\n    return \"\", None, None, 0\r\n\r\n\r\ndef find_change_history(\r\n    database: dict[str, Any], entity_type: str, entity_id: int | None, field_name: str, source_value: Any\r\n) -> str:\r\n    if entity_id is None:\r\n        return \"\"\r\n    aliases = {entity_type, entity_type.removesuffix(\"_record\"), entity_type.removesuffix(\"s\")}\r\n    for record in [*database.get(\"audit_log\", []), *database.get(\"history\", [])]:\r\n        if clean_text(record.get(\"entity_type\")) not in aliases or int(record.get(\"entity_id\") or -1) != int(entity_id):\r\n            continue\r\n        previous = json_value(record.get(\"previous_values_json\")) or {}\r\n        changed = json_value(record.get(\"changed_fields_json\")) or []\r\n        if isinstance(previous, dict) and field_name in previous and comparison(source_value, previous[field_name], header=field_name) in {\r\n            \"exact_match\", \"normalized_match\"\r\n        }:\r\n            timestamp = clean_text(record.get(\"occurred_at\"))\r\n            reason = clean_text(record.get(\"reason\"))\r\n            return f\"event_id={record.get('id')}; timestamp={timestamp}; reason={reason}; field={field_name}\"\r\n        if field_name in changed and isinstance(previous, dict):\r\n            for old_value in previous.values():\r\n                if comparison(source_value, old_value, header=field_name) in {\"exact_match\", \"normalized_match\"}:\r\n                    return f\"event_id={record.get('id')}; timestamp={clean_text(record.get('occurred_at'))}; field={field_name}\"\r\n    return \"\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef issue_original_preserved(issue: dict[str, Any]) -> bool:\r\n    source_field = clean_text(issue.get(\"field_name\"))\r\n    raw = json_value(issue.get(\"raw_values_json\")) or {}\r\n    resolution = json_value(issue.get(\"resolution_notes\")) or {}\r\n    return bool(\r\n        issue.get(\"source_value\") is not None\r\n        or (source_field and isinstance(raw, dict) and source_field in raw)\r\n        or (issue.get(\"issue_code\") and source_field and isinstance(resolution, dict))\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef reconcile(\r\n    workbook_path: Path,\r\n    inventory: dict[str, Any],\r\n    source_rows: dict[str, dict[int, dict[str, Any]]],\r\n    mappings: list[dict[str, Any]],\r\n    database: dict[str, Any],\r\n    location_audit: dict[str, Any],\r\n    *,\r\n    include_file_existence_check: bool,\r\n) -> dict[str, Any]:\r\n    mapping_index = {(item[\"workbook_sheet\"], item[\"source_header\"]): item for item in mappings}\r\n    import_row_index = {\r\n        (item[\"source_sheet\"], int(item[\"source_row_number\"])): item for item in database[\"import_rows\"]\r\n    }\r\n    indexes = {\r\n        \"audits\": _indexed(database[\"audits\"], \"audit_identifier\"),\r\n        \"eoats\": _indexed(database[\"eoats\"], \"business_identifier\"),\r\n        \"machines\": _indexed(database[\"machines\"], \"machine_number\"),\r\n        \"tools\": _indexed(database[\"tools\"], \"tool_number\"),\r\n        \"photos\": _indexed(database[\"photos\"], \"source_identifier\"),\r\n    }\r\n    relation_sets = {\r\n        \"eoat_machine\": {(normalized_value(item[\"eoat_identifier\"]), normalized_value(item[\"machine_number\"])): item\r\n                         for item in database[\"relationships\"][\"eoat_machine\"]},\r\n        \"eoat_tool\": {(normalized_value(item[\"eoat_identifier\"]), normalized_value(item[\"tool_number\"])): item\r\n                      for item in database[\"relationships\"][\"eoat_tool\"]},\r\n        \"tool_machine\": {(normalized_value(item[\"tool_number\"]), normalized_value(item[\"machine_number\"])): item\r\n                         for item in database[\"relationships\"][\"tool_machine\"]},\r\n        \"installations\": {(normalized_value(item[\"eoat_identifier\"]), normalized_value(item[\"machine_number\"])): item\r\n                          for item in database[\"relationships\"][\"installations\"] if item.get(\"is_current\")},\r\n        \"installed_observations\": {\r\n            (normalized_value(item[\"eoat_identifier\"]), normalized_value(item[\"machine_number\"])): item\r\n            for item in database[\"relationships\"].get(\"location_observations\", [])\r\n            if clean_text(item.get(\"state\")).upper() == \"INSTALLED\" and item.get(\"is_authoritative\")\r\n        },\r\n        \"stored_observations\": {\r\n            normalized_value(item[\"eoat_identifier\"]): item\r\n            for item in database[\"relationships\"].get(\"location_observations\", [])\r\n            if clean_text(item.get(\"state\")).upper() == \"STORED\" and item.get(\"is_authoritative\")\r\n        },\r\n    }\r\n    document_links: dict[int, list[dict[str, Any]]] = defaultdict(list)\r\n    for link in database[\"document_links\"]:\r\n        document_links[int(link[\"document_id\"])].append(link)\r\n\r\n    row_results: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\r\n    field_results: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\r\n    relationship_results: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\r\n    missing_entities: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\r\n    missing_relationships: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\r\n    mismatches: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\r\n    ambiguous: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\r\n    document_results: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\r\n\r\n    for sheet, rows in source_rows.items():\r\n        for row_number, source in rows.items():\r\n            if sheet == \"EOAT Inventory\":\r\n                business_key = clean_text(source.get(\"Audit ID\"))\r\n            elif sheet == \"Photo Index\":\r\n                business_key = clean_text(source.get(\"Photo ID\")) or f\"row-{row_number}\"\r\n            elif sheet in METADATA_SHEETS:\r\n                business_key = clean_text(source.get(\"key\")) or f\"row-{row_number}\"\r\n            else:\r\n                business_key = f\"row-{row_number}\"\r\n            fingerprint = source_fingerprint(sheet, row_number, source)\r\n            if sheet in DERIVED_SHEETS:\r\n                row_results.append({\r\n                    \"sheet\": sheet, \"source_row\": row_number, \"business_key\": business_key,\r\n                    \"source_fingerprint\": fingerprint, \"destination_table\": \"audit_records/details_json\",\r\n                    \"destination_primary_key\": \"\", \"result\": \"equivalent_normalized_relationship\",\r\n                    \"details\": \"Derived grouped report; source facts are reconciled through EOAT Inventory.\",\r\n                })\r\n                continue\r\n            if sheet in TEMPLATE_SHEETS and is_presentation_note(source.values()):\r\n                row_results.append({\r\n                    \"sheet\": sheet, \"source_row\": \"is_active\": 1}\r\n    baseline = {\"code\": \"photo\", \"display_name\": \"Photo\", \"description\": \"Controlled\", \"sort_order\": 20, \"is_active\": 1}\r\n    assert migration.seed_meaning(source, \"code\") == migration.seed_meaning(baseline, \"code\")\r\n    assert migration.semantic_row(source) != migration.semantic_row(baseline)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_source_schema_mismatch_is_rejected() -> None:\r\n    with pytest.raises(RuntimeError, match=\"schema mismatch\"):\r\n        migration.assert_safe_source({\"database_name\": \"eoat_atlas_dev\", \"alembic_revision\": \"old\"})\r\n\r\n\r\n@pytest.mark.parametrize(\"name\", [\"eoat_atlas_prod\", \"EOAT_ATLAS_PROD\", \"customer_prod\"])\r\ndef test_production_source_is_rejected(name: str) -> migration.REQUIRED_REVISION}\r\n    with pytest.raises(RuntimeError, match=\"test database\"):\r\n        migration.assert_safe_source(identity)\r\n    migration.assert_safe_source(identity, validation_mode=True)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_dependency_order_places_parents_before_children_and_is_stable() -> None:\r\n    meta = {\r\n        \"parent\": {\"foreign_keys\": []},\r\n        \"child_b\": {\"foreign_keys\": [{\"REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME\": \"parent\"}]},\r\n        \"child_a\": {\"foreign_keys\": [{\"REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME\": \"parent\"}]},\r\n    }\r\n    first = migration.dependency_order(meta, set(meta))\r\n    second = migration.dependency_order(meta, set(meta))\r\n    assert first == second == [\"parent\", \"child_a\", \"child_b\"]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_stable_row_order_produces_deterministic_sql() -> None:\r\n    rows = [{\"id\": 1, \"name\": \"alpha\"}, {\"id\": 2, \"name\": \"Î²eta\"}]\r\n    first = migration.insert_sql(LiteralConnection(), \"items\", rows, [\"id\", \"name\"])\r\n    second = migration.insert_sql(LiteralConnection(), \"items\", rows, [\"id\", \"name\"])\r\n    assert first == second\r\n    assert \"Î²eta\" in first[0]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_binary_and_nullable_values_are_safe() -> None:\r\n    connection = LiteralConnection()\r\n    assert migration.sql_literal(connection, b\"\\x00\\xff\") == \"X'00FF'\"\r\n    assert migration.sql_literal(connection, None) == \"NULL\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_generated_columns_are_not_part_of_insert_contract() -> None:\r\n    source = test_excluded_runtime_foreign_keys_are_cleared_and_counted() -> None:\r\n    meta = {\r\n        \"foreign_keys\": [\r\n            {\"COLUMN_NAME\": \"actor_user_id\", \"REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME\": sum(report.values()) == 2\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_required_excluded_foreign_key_is_refused() -> None:\r\n    meta = {\r\n        \"foreign_keys\": [{\"COLUMN_NAME\": \"user_id\", (1,'CL-EOAT-0001');\") == []\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_artifact_checksum_and_manifest_accuracy(tmp_path: Path) -> None:\r\n    artifact = tmp_path / \"operational-data.sql\"\r\n    artifact.write_text(\"SELECT 1;\\n\", encoding=\"utf-8\")\r\n    digest = hashlib.sha256(artifact.read_bytes()).hexdigest()\r\n    (tmp_path / \"migration-manifest.json\").write_text(json.dumps({\r\n str:\r\n    if value is None:\r\n        return \"\"\r\n    if isinstance(value, datetime):\r\n        return value.isoformat(sep=\" \")\r\n    if isinstance(value, date):\r\n        return value.isoformat()\r\n    if isinstance(value, bool):\r\n        return \"true\" if value else \"false\"\r\n    if isinstance(value, float) and value.is_integer():\r\n        return str(int(value))\r\n    return str(value).replace(\"\\r\\n\", \"\\n\").replace(\"\\r\", \"\\n\").strip()\r\n\r\n\r\ndef normalized_header(value: Any) -> str:\r\n    return re.sub(r\"[^a-z0-9]+\", \"_\", clean_text(value).casefold()).strip(\"_\")\r\n\r\n\r\ndef normalized_value(value: Any, *, header: str = \"\") -> str:\r\n    result = clean_text(value)\r\n    result = re.sub(r\"[ \\t]+\", \" \", result).strip()\r\n    lowered = result.casefold()\r\n    if lowered in MISSING_TOKENS:\r\n        return \"\"\r\n    if re.fullmatch(r\"\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2} 00:00:00(?:\\.0+)?\", result):\r\n        return result[:10]\r\n    if lowered in {\"yes\", \"y\", \"true\", \"present\", \"1\"}:\r\n        return \"true\"\r\n    if lowered in {\"no\", \"n\", \"false\", \"not present\", \"0\"}:\r\n        return \"false\"\r\n    if \"path\" in header.casefold() or \"file\" in header.casefold():\r\n        result = result.replace(\"/\", \"\\\\\")\r\n        result = re.sub(r\"\\\\+\", r\"\\\\\", result)\r\n    return result.casefold()\r\n\r\n\r\ndef comparison(source: Any, destination: Any, *, header: str = \"\") -> str:\r\n    if clean_text(source) == clean_text(destination):\r\n        return \"exact_match\"\r\n    if normalized_value(source, header=header) == normalized_value(destination, header=header):\r\n        return \"normalized_match\"\r\n    source_normalized = normalized_value(source, header=header)\r\n    destination_normalized = normalized_value(destination, header=header)\r\n    if destination_normalized and len(destination_normalized) < len(source_normalized) and source_normalized.startswith(destination_normalized):\r\n        return \"truncated_database_value\"\r\n    return \"conflicting_database_value\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef split_multi_value(value: Any) -> list[str]:\r\n    raw = clean_text(value)\r\n    if not raw:\r\n        return []\r\n    return [part.strip() for part in re.split(r\"[,;|\\n]+\", raw) if part.strip()]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef source_fingerprint(sheet: str, row_number: int, values: dict[str, Any]) -> str:\r\n    payload = json.dumps(\r\n        {key: clean_text(value) for key, value in sorted(values.items())},\r\n        ensure_ascii=False,\r\n        sort_keys=True,\r\n        separators=(\",\", \":\"),\r\n    )\r\n    return is_presentation_note(values: Iterable[Any]) -> bool:\r\n    populated = [clean_text(value) for value in values if clean_text(value)]\r\n    return bool(populated) and all(value.casefold().startswith(\"last updated:\") for value in populated)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef find_header_row(sheet) -> int:\r\n    if sheet.title == \"Audit by Press\":\r\n        return 3\r\n    if sheet.tables:\r\n        first = next(iter(sheet.tables.values()))\r\n        _, min_row, _, _ = range_boundaries(first.ref)\r\n        return min_row\r\n    best_row, best_score = 1, -1\r\n    keywords = {\"id\", \"date\", \"notes\", \"tool\", \"machine\", \"eoat\", \"key\", \"value\"}\r\n    for row in range(1, min(sheet.max_row, 10) + 1):\r\n        values = [clean_text(sheet.cell(row, col).value) for col in range(1, sheet.max_column + 1)]\r\n        score = sum(bool(value) for value in values) + sum(\r\n            any(word in value.casefold() for word in keywords) for value in
